statement.markdown: Given an array of integers, implement a function to use a stack to determine if it is possible to build it by taking two arrays of integers from the given array and pushing them onto two different stacks. If it is possible, return true; otherwise, return false.
statement.inputFormat: Input is an array of integers
statement.outputFormat: Return true if it's possible to build the array with two stacks, false otherwise
statement.notes: Time Complexity: O(n), Space Complexity: O(n)

examples.explanation: Can be divided into two stacks: [1, 2, 3] and [4, 5]

functionSignature.java: public boolean isPossible(int[] nums, int n);
